tasks.title: Add `KNOWN_BRANCHES` constant to `sdd_meta`
tasks.parallelism_notes: Touches scripts/sdd/sdd_meta.py + tests/sdd_scripts/test_sdd_meta.py; file-disjoint from every other task in this spec. Could run in a sibling worktree alongside TASK-1254. Spec recommends sequential per Worktree Strategy.

tasks.title: Create `sync-down.yml` GitHub Action
tasks.parallelism_notes: Touches only .github/workflows/sync-down.yml; file-disjoint from every other task. Functionally independent of TASK-1253 — could run before, after, or alongside it.

tasks.title: Refactor `/sdd-done` sync-down to target `{staging, dev}`
tasks.parallelism_notes: Logical dependency on TASK-1253 (KNOWN_BRANCHES) for prose references, and on TASK-1254 (Action) so that the rewritten skill can reference the Action by filename in deprecation/fallback messages. File-disjoint, so technically parallelizable, but content-coherent only after both upstreams exist.

tasks.title: Block `type: feature, base_branch: main` across SDD commands
tasks.parallelism_notes: Depends on TASK-1253 (KNOWN_BRANCHES) for prose. Touches 5 command/agent files that are disjoint from every other task's surface. Could run in parallel with TASK-1255 in principle but bunching all command edits sequentially reduces review noise.

tasks.title: Documentation refresh — three-branch model + release-cut procedure
tasks.parallelism_notes: Documentation must describe what was actually built. Sequenced after every implementation task so the prose matches the realized behaviour.

tasks.title: Acceptance test guard — `staging`-mention check + workflow lint
tasks.parallelism_notes: Regression test depends on the artifacts it asserts about. Must run last in dependency order.
